Records.description: Two-loop sunrise graph with two equal masses m2 and one different mass m1, in d=2-2eps. Elliptic curve geometry. A new function G defined as an integral over the holomorphic period is required for epsilon-factorisation; G is related to an elliptic integral of the third kind. The GM connection involves varpi_0 and G but not derivatives of periods.
Records.familyName: two-loop sunrise (two equal + one different mass)
